29th April 201 1 
TO WHOM IT MAY CONCERN 
Re: New Passport Issuance System for the Government of Republic of Malawi 
• 
This letter is to certify that the Department oflmmigration, Government of Malawi has 
implemented a new Machine Readable Passport Issuance System to issue secure and 
personalized Passports to citizens of Republic of Malawi. This project was 
implemented in February 2010 under BUild -Operate -Transfer (BOT) model by 
Techno Brain Ltd. in Partnership with Global Enterprise Technologies (GET), 
American Bank Note (ABN) and L-1 Identity Sqlutions, USA. 
Immigration Department started releasing new passports from February 2010 and has 
issued more than 100,000 passports as on date. Trus most secure and advanced 
Passport Issuance system incorporates the state-of-the-art bion ietric enrollment, 
issuing management software, passport booklets and the world's most advanced 
personalization system based on renowned Toppan technology. 
Key Highlights of the new Malawi Passport Is�ance System are: 
• The Malawian passport, . with its entire new conpeptual security design 
incorporates multiple security features which make it impossible to be 
cotmterfeited. 
• The passport holder's <;lata page is coated with a very thin tran.Sparent film 
which carries the most sophisticated unique security a�pects known in the 
industry. 
' 
• The Passport holder's Data Page combines three levels of s.ecurity, those 
verified by visual check, verified by simple instruments and fmally those 
verified by a speCial instrument at forensic lab. This combination signiticantly 
enhanc.es the security of the passport and facilitates both visual and automated 
detection of simulati<;ms. and counterfeits. 
• The bearer '·s photo printed by special secure inks has a unique . quality 
appear�nce, containing encoded data which is not visible . to naked eye except 
with the use ofspecial. lenses. 
• The various security elements are. supported by powerful back�end systems of 
sophisticated biometric enrolment authentication and appLicants' data 

processing software in order to ensure the authenticity and accuracy of the 
passport's holder data page without risking any duplication or fraud. 
• The Entire passport system is designed to achieve the fastest processing of data 
management which would enhance the public service by shortening the 
passport's production time to the minimum for the comfort of the Malawian 
citizens. 
• Entire PIS System is connected on a Wide Area Computer Network connecting 
Immigration offices located at Blantyre, Lilongwe and Mzuzu . 
• 
The project has been well supported by Global Enterprise Technologies, American 
Bank Note and L-1 Identity Solutions by providing Passpo.rt personalization software 
and hardware, Passport Booklets and Biometric components respectively. 
We appreciate Techno Brain Ltd. tot their excellent Systems Integration capabilities 
during the implementation process of this large and turnkey project. Techno Brain has 
been providing excellent operational and post-implementation services through their 
locally available skiJled engineers which ensure continuous and instant support for the 
system. 
Above all we are pleased with the commitment shown by Techno Brain to make the 
project successful as per the project timelines and expectations of the Department of 
Immigration. 
For any further clalification please contact undersigned 
Elvis Thodi
